title: Rainbow Reef
description: Rainbow Reef is a mod that adds content to spruce up your in-game aquariums and coral reefs, including lots of new fish and sea creatures!
body:
Rainbow Reef is a mod that adds various real-life species of reef fish to your world!
check out our wiki to learn more! [https://sites.google.com/view/rainbow-reef-site/home](https://sites.google.com/view/rainbow-reef-site/home)

The mod now also adds several food items, one for each fish with a drop. Most of these foods have their own uses and niches that make them handy to have in all sorts of situations!
